packName: Demo Pro Pack — Placeholder Content Only
description: Schema and upload-flow test data. This file intentionally contains no real paid Pro Pack content.

templates.title: Demo Authentication Review
templates.useCase: Test how an uploaded Pro template appears in the catalog.
templates.description: Placeholder content for local upload-flow testing only.
templates.prompt: This is a demo-only placeholder prompt. Confirm that the Pro Pack upload, catalog, detail, copy, persistence, and clear-pack flows work. Do not use this placeholder as a real security review.
expectedOutput: Confirmation that the demo upload flow works

templates.title: Demo Authorization Review
templates.useCase: Test Pro source and tier labels.
templates.description: Placeholder authorization card with no real paid prompt content.
templates.prompt: This is a demo-only placeholder prompt. Verify the Uploaded Pro Pack source label and Pro Unlocked tier state. Do not use this placeholder as a real security review.

templates.title: Demo Business Logic Review
templates.description: Placeholder business-logic card for UI testing.
templates.prompt: This is a demo-only placeholder prompt. Verify that uploaded templates can be searched and filtered. Do not use this placeholder as a real security review.

templates.title: Demo API Architecture Review
templates.description: Placeholder API card for schema validation testing.
templates.prompt: This is a demo-only placeholder prompt. Verify that a valid uploaded API template passes schema validation. Do not use this placeholder as a real security review.

templates.title: Demo Multi-Tenant Review
templates.useCase: Test persistence after a page reload.
templates.description: Placeholder SaaS card for localStorage testing.
templates.prompt: This is a demo-only placeholder prompt. Verify that the uploaded pack remains available after a page reload and is stored only in localStorage.

templates.title: Demo Admin Tools Review
templates.useCase: Test the Pro template detail panel.
templates.description: Placeholder admin card for detail-view testing.
templates.prompt: This is a demo-only placeholder prompt. Open this template and verify the detail panel, expected output, safety notes, tags, and copy control.
expectedOutput: Confirmation that the detail view works

templates.title: Demo AI Feature Review
templates.useCase: Test a Pro AI category without shipping paid content.
templates.description: Placeholder AI card for upload testing.
templates.prompt: This is a demo-only placeholder prompt. Confirm that the Pro UI can represent AI security content without bundling real paid prompt material.
expectedOutput: Confirmation that the Pro AI card renders

templates.title: Demo Release Review
templates.description: Placeholder release card for lock-state testing.
templates.prompt: This is a demo-only placeholder prompt. Use Clear Pro Pack and verify that uploaded templates disappear and public Pro sections return to the locked state.
expectedOutput: Confirmation that clearing relocks Pro sections
